title: BreadBoard Structured Error v1
description: Typed error envelope used for validation failures, ordering violations, and runtime faults.

error_id.description: Stable error identifier for correlation and triage.

recoverable.description: Whether retry or fallback is expected to recover safely.

context.description: Structured error context for diagnostics and replay.

thread_id.description: Optional thread identifier related to the error.

session_id.description: Optional session identifier related to the error.

op_id.description: Optional operation identifier related to the error.

emitted_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the error was emitted.
